CAPTAIN'S LOG — DANIELE D'AGNELLI

PORT OF ORIGIN: BARI, ITALY

set sail 2012. first commission as software engineer under the accenture fleet. three years learning the ropes. built the foundations of a technical arsenal.

DUBLIN HARBOUR, IRELAND (2015-2017)

transferred to the codec vessel. senior consultant. new waters, new crew. the atlantic crossing that changed everything.

LONDON DOCKS, ENGLAND (2017-PRESENT)

the crown port. accenture again, then deloitte — where we built an entire fleet from nothing. 25+ sailors recruited. now commanding the c3 ai flagship: $15m cargo, 70+ crew, operations across 100+ ports.

LANGUAGES SPOKEN: italian (native tongue) · english (fluent, the king's own)

TREASURES CLAIMED: $18m ebit · nps >70 · 2,000+ souls served
